experiment.hypothesis: If riker applies aggressive subtraction + modular repetition; avoid drifting into Photographic Decay and Archive Corruption while breaking 'strict symmetry', the piece will increase novelty without losing coherence.
successCriteria: Visual anchor is clear within 2 seconds.
At least one compositional choice visibly departs from prior habit.
Concept is specific, not generic mood.
experiment.noveltyDirective: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature

method: Curated reference graph -> influence plan -> experiment design -> generate -> critique -> memory/genome update

selfCritique.notes: Keep pushing arc progression with controlled novelty.

finalOutput.artistThinking: Creating 'Echoes of Absence' allows me to explore the tension between presence and absence in an emotionally charged way. I am drawn to the idea that absence can be a powerful force, shaping our perceptions of memory and ritual. By utilizing aggressive subtraction and modular repetition, I aim to capture the essence of this concept without falling into the trap of photographic decay.
finalOutput.inspirationNote: The visual anchor of large negative fields combined with stacked blocks reflects the structural rhythm found in brutalist architecture. My research into the concept of 'Ma' has influenced my approach to using negative space as a meaningful element in the composition.
finalOutput.prompt: Art direction: lyrical, emotionally charged, symbolic. Primary medium language: digital collage with painterly textures. Core motifs: memory, tension, ritual. Arc context: Arc "Cathedrals of Memory" step 2/4. Visual anchor directive: large negative fields with stacked blocks. Palette strategy: high-contrast with one muted counterweight. Composition strategy: single dominant anchor with asymmetric support. Conceptual center: absence as active force; counterpoint with order under stress. Evolution target: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature. Deliberately avoid: strict symmetry. Technique emphasis: aggressive subtraction + modular repetition; avoid drifting into Photographic Decay and Archive Corruption. Render one finished artwork only. No text overlays. No watermark. High detail. Cohesive composition.
finalOutput.rationale: Arc Cathedrals of Memory step 2/4: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature.
